document_summary: Invitation letter from PKU Postdoctoral Office inviting Professor Dehuan Liu to serve as expert reviewer at the Boya Postdoctoral Program Expert Review Meeting (Second Batch, Total Third Batch) in 2017 (Humanities and Social Sciences). Meeting on May 26, 2017. Liu invited to oversee and introduce application materials of School of Journalism and Communication and vote on all applications.

snippets.text: Invitation Letter of Peking University Second Batch (Total Third Batch) Boya Postdoctoral Program Expert ReviewMeeting in 2017 (Humanities and Social Sciences)
snippets.subject: Title of Boya Postdoctoral Expert Review Meeting invitation
snippets.reasoning: Title of the expert review meeting to which Liu was invited as a reviewer.

snippets.subject: Invitation addressed to Professor Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Confirms the invitation was directed to Liu as a Professor.

snippets.text: Peking University Second Batch (Total Third Batch) Boya Postdoctoral Program Expert Review Meeting in 2011 is going to be held on May 26, 2017 (this Friday) from 9:00 to 11:30 a.m. at Meeting Room 318, Building 5B, Shaoyuan Guest House, please attend the meeting on time. You are invited to oversee the Boya postdoctoral application materials of the School of Journalism and Communication and other departments, and introduce them at the meeting. Please also review the application materials of the Boya postdoctoral program of other schools together so that you have a prior understanding of all application materials when voting at the meeting.
snippets.subject: Liu invited to oversee, introduce, and vote on Boya postdoctoral applications
snippets.reasoning: Specifies Liu's role: review and present application materials, vote on all Boya postdoctoral applications.

snippets.subject: Sender: PKU Postdoctoral Office
snippets.reasoning: Identifies the Postdoctoral Office as the official body that invited Liu.

relations.context: Postdoctoral Office invited Liu as expert reviewer for Boya Postdoctoral applications
